title: Metals rally amid improving outlook in China
section_path: Metals rally amid improving outlook in China
section_path_text: Metals rally amid improving outlook in China
summary:
Main
Sentiment was buoyed by Beijing's efforts to support economic growth. However, uncertainty around US trade policy kept the gains limited. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-03-07 112201.png | assets/2025-03-07_metals-rally-amid-improving-outlook-in-china_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_ada95c62b037.png

Market Commentary
Copper led the base metals sector higher as expectations of further stimulus measures in China boosted sentiment.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Sentiment was buoyed by Beijing's efforts to support economic growth. However, uncertainty around US trade policy kept the gains limited.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Copper led the base metals sector higher as expectations of further stimulus measures in China boosted sentiment. China leaders continued their top legislative meetings on Thursday, with the market looking for more specifics around efforts to reduce overcapacity in heavy industries.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: Chinese steel inventories are at their lowest level on a seasonal basis in more than 10 years. This suggests demand is not as dire as sentiment would suggest.
